## Summary

-

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm audit --audit-level=moderate`
- [ ] `npm run report:quality` if Romanized, dictionary, fixture, or suggestion behavior changed

## Privacy and Data

- [ ] No typed text, converted text, queries, keystrokes, clipboard content, spell tokens, or output text leaves the browser automatically
- [ ] New or changed data has source and license notes
- [ ] No private documents, personal data, or unclear-licensed mappings are included
